identity.name: Johns Solar Empires
identity.description: Gives the player's empire autonomous behaviour while you explore the galaxy. Colonies generate passive income every 60 seconds. Uninhabited player-owned planets are slowly terraformed toward T3 every 2 minutes. The empire automatically colonizes nearby unclaimed T3 worlds every 5 minutes (costs 10,000 Sporebucks). Underdeveloped colonies grow additional cities every 3 minutes. All activity is logged to the in-game console.
identity.author: Johns Solar Empires
